html:
BANOFFEE TRIFLES

Ingredients

  • 30 ml rum
  • 250 ml tropical fruit juice
  • 2 bananas
  • 6 boudoir biscuits
  • 1 tub mascarpone cheese
  • 125 ml caramel treat
  • 250 ml bought custard
  • 2 small meringues
  • Bought chocolate sauce for drizzling on top

Method

  1. Mix the rum and fruit juice. Press the boudoir biscuits into the mixture and pack them into the bottom of the glass
  2. Now let the bananas sit in the rum mixture.
  3. Place the bananas on the biscuits.
  4. Now spoon a layer of caramel over the bananas.
  5. Whisk the custard and mascarpone cheese together
  6. Now put a thick layer of the custard mixture on the caramel
  7. Crumble the meringue over the top and drizzle chocolate sauce over everything.
